title: IIFL Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIFL Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIFL Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IIFL Finance:
IIFL Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance!
